tool_args.label: Capital Program and Operations Committee Charters Amended November 17, 2021

payload.description: Capital Program Committee Charter and Committee on Operations Charters for TBTA, LIRR/LIB, Metro-North, and NYCT/MaBSTOA/SIRTOA/MTA Bus amended/adopted

payload.claim_text: Regular meetings of the MTA board shall be held at 10:00 A.M. on the fourth Wednesday of each month except no meeting in August, and in November and December on the third Wednesday.
payload.subject: MTA Board Meeting Schedule

payload.claim_text: The board of each MTA subsidiary (MTA C&D, FMTAC, GCMOC, LIRR, Metro-North, MTA Bus, NYCT, SIRTOA) consists of all persons who hold office as chairman or members of the Metropolitan Transportation Authority pursuant to §1263 of the Public Authorities Law.
payload.subject: MTA Subsidiary Boards
payload.description: All MTA subsidiary and affiliate agencies share the same board members as the Metropolitan Transportation Authority.

payload.claim_text: The Audit Committee assists the Board Chair and the Board in monitoring and overseeing the MTA's financial reporting process, internal controls, risk management systems, and legal/regulatory/ethical compliance.
payload.subject: Audit Committee Purpose
